settings_passkeys_section_desc: Sign in with device unlock, biometrics, or a security key instead of typing your password.
settings_passkeys_name_placeholder: For example: MacBook, iPhone, or security key
settings_passkeys_add_hint: Your browser opens the system passkey prompt when you add one.
settings_passkeys_empty_desc: After adding a passkey, you can sign in from the login page using device unlock.
settings_passkeys_delete_desc: After deletion, this device or security key can no longer sign in to this account.
